context: Tests whether the agent correctly maps all JUnit 5 assertion types to their Kotest equivalents when converting a test file, including the argument-order reversal for assertEquals and the withClue pattern for assertions with messages.

checklist.name: assertEquals order
checklist.description: assertEquals(7, result) is converted to 'result shouldBe 7' (actual on left, expected on right) — NOT '7 shouldBe result'

checklist.name: withClue for message
checklist.description: assertEquals(6, result, "ten minus four should be six") is converted using withClue("ten minus four should be six") { result shouldBe 6 }

checklist.name: shouldBeTrue
checklist.description: assertTrue(result > 0) is converted to (result > 0).shouldBeTrue() or (result > 0) shouldBe true

checklist.name: shouldBeFalse
checklist.description: assertFalse(result < 0) is converted to (result < 0).shouldBeFalse() or (result < 0) shouldBe false

checklist.name: JUnit imports removed
checklist.description: No import lines from org.junit.* remain in the output file

checklist.name: Kotest imports added
checklist.description: At least one import from io.kotest.* is present (e.g. io.kotest.matchers.shouldBe)

checklist.name: Imports sorted
checklist.description: All import statements in the output file are sorted alphabetically
